title: Bank ABC Egypt (Egypt) Profile & Reviews
description: Explore a detailed profile and institutional data for Bank ABC Egypt in Egypt. Share your experience or access institutional-grade data for professional insights.

faq.question: What is Bank ABC Egypt?
faq.answer: Bank ABC Egypt is a commercial bank operating in the Arab Republic of Egypt, offering retail and corporate banking services to individuals and businesses. The bank is a subsidiary of Arab Banking Corporation (Bank ABC), an international banking group headquartered in Bahrain. Bank ABC Egypt has significantly expanded its presence in the Egyptian market following its 2023 merger with BLOM Bank Egypt, which tripled its market share and expanded its network to 68 branches throughout the country. The bank provides a comprehensive range of financial services across retail banking, corporate banking, and treasury operations.

faq.question: When was Bank ABC Egypt founded?
faq.answer: Bank ABC Egypt was originally established on August 21, 1982, under the provisions of Egyptian investment law as an investment and business bank. The bank was initially named Egypt Arab African Bank (S.A.E.). In 2000, the bank underwent a name change to Arab Banking Corporation - Egypt (S.A.E.), formalized through ministerial decree No. 788 and published in the investment gazette on April 18, 2000. The bank's headquarters was established in Cairo, where it continues to operate today. In August 2021, Arab Banking Corporation (Bahrain) acquired a 99.5% stake in BLOM Bank Egypt. The legal merger between Bank ABC Egypt and BLOM Bank Egypt was completed on January 1, 2023, creating a significantly larger combined entity operating under the Bank ABC Egypt name.

faq.question: Where is Bank ABC Egypt headquartered?
faq.answer: Bank ABC Egypt is headquartered in New Cairo, specifically at 90th Street North, Building N 39 B, in the Fifth Settlement area. The postal code is 11835. New Cairo has emerged as a major financial and business district in Egypt, making it a strategic location for the bank's administrative and executive operations. The headquarters serves as the central hub for the bank's operations across Egypt.

faq.question: Where does Bank ABC Egypt operate?
faq.answer: Bank ABC Egypt operates throughout Egypt with a network of 68 branches following the 2023 merger with BLOM Bank Egypt. The bank's branches are strategically located across major cities and economic centers throughout the country, including Cairo, Alexandria, Luxor, Aswan, Mansoura, Damietta, and Hurghada. The bank maintains both on-site and off-site ATM coverage throughout its operating areas. This extensive branch network enables Bank ABC Egypt to serve customers in urban centers, provincial capitals, and key commercial zones across Egypt.

faq.question: What services does Bank ABC Egypt offer?
faq.answer: Bank ABC Egypt provides comprehensive banking services across retail and corporate segments: Retail Banking: Credit cards, Visa Electron debit cards, personal loans, car loans, overdraft facilities, current accounts, savings accounts, time deposits, and savings certificates. The bank offers premium banking services with dedicated personal bankers for tailored financial solutions. Corporate Banking: Project financing, debt restructuring, syndicated loans, acquisition financing, trade finance services, and treasury solutions. The bank serves various business sectors including importing, exporting, trading, communications, and consultancy services. Trade Finance: Comprehensive international trade services including letters of credit, documentary collections, and trade guarantees to support Egyptian businesses in global commerce. Treasury Services: Foreign exchange services, money market operations, and financial derivatives for both corporate and institutional clients. Digital Banking: Online banking platforms, mobile banking applications, SMS banking services, and telephone banking. The bank plans to introduce Bank ABC's mobile-only banking platform "ila" and enhanced payment capabilities through Arab Financial Services (AFS). Investment Services: Through its corporate banking division, the bank provides investment advisory and structured finance solutions.

faq.question: What makes Bank ABC Egypt unique?
faq.answer: Bank ABC Egypt's 2023 merger with BLOM Bank Egypt represents one of the most significant banking consolidations in recent Egyptian banking history. The merger tripled the bank's market share and brought its total assets to EGP 67 billion on a combined basis, creating substantial scale advantages in the competitive Egyptian market. The bank benefits from its connection to Bank ABC Group's international network spanning five continents, providing Egyptian clients with access to global banking capabilities and correspondent banking relationships. This international connectivity positions Bank ABC Egypt as a bridge between Egyptian businesses and international markets. Following the merger, Bank ABC Egypt launched a comprehensive integration program designed to combine the best practices and capabilities of both legacy institutions. The bank is investing in digital transformation initiatives, including plans to introduce innovative digital services and enhanced payment technologies.

faq.question: What type of financial institution is Bank ABC Egypt?
faq.answer: Bank ABC Egypt is a commercial bank (also referred to as a retail and commercial bank) operating in Egypt. The bank is licensed and regulated by the Central Bank of Egypt (CBE) and operates under Egyptian banking laws and regulations. Commercial banks in Egypt are authorized to provide comprehensive banking services to both retail customers and corporate clients, including deposit-taking, lending, trade finance, and payment services. Bank ABC Egypt holds all necessary licenses from the Central Bank of Egypt to conduct its full range of banking, financial, and commercial activities throughout the Egyptian market.
